  • Classes in org.javalabs.jpa used by org.javalabs.jpa
    Class
    Description
    FactoryStore
    Store to hold the actiev EntityManagerFactory.
    JdbcException
    The JPA-LiTE framework will throw JdbcException if the query execution fails.
    JdbcReader
    JDBC Reader object.
    JdbcWriter
    JDBC writer class.
    LiteEntityManager
    Native Entity Manager to interact with the persistence context.
    LiteEntityManagerFactory
    JPA LiTE entity manager factory.
    ModelProcessor
    Model Processor class.
    PersistenceHolder
    Holder class to keep the metadata details.
    PersistenceUnitCache
    Cache to store the PersistenceUnitInfo.
    PersistenceVerifier
    This verifier class verifies the database properties in the persistence config file.
    Query
    Base interface to represent a query executor.
    QueryMechanism
    The query mechanism interface.
    Work
    Indicates a work that an EntityManager is performing.
